title: Plaza Lama
description: Plaza Lama is a retail company based in the Dominican Republic that offers a wide range of products including electronics, home goods, clothing, and groceries. The company aims to provide quality products at competitive prices to meet the needs of its diverse clientele. Plaza Lama serves both individual consumers and businesses, making it a go-to destination for shopping in the region. With multiple locations, it strives to enhance the shopping experience through excellent customer service and a variety of offerings
